creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch on pkg-plist is now obsolete so it has to be removed for this to apply.

Also, it should be noticed that this changes the RUN_DEPENDS default.  before git was pulled in unconditionally, now it is not by default.  This may be intentional though.

Moving to patch-ready -- the committer can handle the (common) pkg-plist obsolescence issue.
